Metrics.Label: Total Predicted To Pay
Metrics.Description: Line Items where Forecasting Payability = Payable + Potentially Payable + Payable - Need Action

Metrics.Label: Total Predicted - Paid
Metrics.Description: Line Items where Forecasting Payability = Payable + Potentially Payable + Payable - Need Action AND Pay Status = Paid

Metrics.Label: Total Unpaid
Metrics.Description: Line Items where Forecasting Payability = Payable + Potentially Payable + Payable - Need Action AND Pay Status = Denied, Adjusted, No Response

Metrics.Label: Denied
Metrics.Description: Line Items where Forecasting Payability = Payable + Potentially Payable + Payable - Need Action AND Pay Status = Denied

Metrics.Label: Adjusted
Metrics.Description: Line Items where Forecasting Payability = Payable + Potentially Payable + Payable - Need Action AND Pay Status = Adjusted

Metrics.Label: No Response
Metrics.Description: Line Items where Forecasting Payability = Payable + Potentially Payable + Payable - Need Action AND Pay Status = No Response

Ratios.Label: Payment Ratio (%)
Ratios.Description: Total Predicted - Paid / Total Predicted to Pay * 100

Ratios.Label: Non-Payment Rate (%)
Ratios.Description: Total Predicted - Unpaid / Total Predicted to Pay * 100

Ratios.Label: Denied (%)
Ratios.Description: Total Predicted - Denied / Total Predicted Unpaid * 100

Ratios.Label: Adjusted (%)
Ratios.Description: Total Predicted - Adjusted / Total Predicted Unpaid * 100

Ratios.Label: No Response (%)
Ratios.Description: Total Predicted - No Response / Total Predicted Unpaid * 100
